moments.title: Wimbledon Men's Final
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon men's singles final is set for Sunday, July 12, with Jannik Sinner facing Alexander Zverev on Centre Court at 4 PM BST.

angles.name: Match Hype
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The Wimbledon Men's Singles Final is tomorrow, with Jannik Sinner taking on Alexander Zverev. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: British Summer Tradition
angles.copy: Strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis. The Wimbledon Men's Final wraps up the tournament tomorrow. What's your favourite part of this iconic British summer event?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days this Sunday, July 12, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with tournament play from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf Major Kicks Off
angles.copy: Get ready for the world's best golfers! The Open Championship officially begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale this Sunday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Returns
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready to host The Open Championship once again! Practice days start this Sunday for the 154th edition of golf's oldest major.

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The Tour de France continues today with Stage 8, a flat run from Périgueux to Bergerac, followed by a hilly Stage 9 tomorrow before Monday's rest day.

angles.name: Sprint Finish Today
angles.copy: It's a sprinter's paradise on today's Tour de France Stage 8 from Périgueux to Bergerac. Expect a fast finish!

angles.name: Hills Tomorrow
angles.copy: No rest for the wicked! After today's flat stage, the Tour de France riders face a challenging hilly Stage 9 tomorrow before Monday's well-deserved rest day.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean hold the top spot on the UK Official Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In' for the week ending July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is your Official UK Singles Chart Number 1 this week. Tune in for more chart-topping tracks!

angles.name: Weekend Playlist Sorted
angles.copy: Need to update your weekend playlist? Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are still at #1 on the Official Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. What's your favourite track in the Top 40?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Still love 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner'? Celebrate with us on Nation 80s!

angles.name: Legendary Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega, turning 67 today! Her storytelling through music is timeless.

moments.title: Lil' Kim's Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and icon Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Queen Bee Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! Drop your favourite track to celebrate this hip-hop legend.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true hip-hop icon, Lil' Kim, who turns 51 today! Her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Richie Sambora's Birthday
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock legend Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to guitar hero Richie Sambora! What's your all-time favourite Bon Jovi riff?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the legendary Richie Sambora, turning 67 today! His guitar work defined an era of rock.

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are breaking up for the summer holidays from Monday, July 20, marking the start of the long-awaited break.

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Many schools across the UK break up for the summer holidays from Monday. Who's excited for the long break?

angles.name: Holiday Mode Activated
angles.copy: School's out for summer! For many, the summer holidays officially kick off from Monday. Time for sunshine, fun, and no more alarms!

moments.title: Gareth Gates' Birthday
moments.blurb: British pop singer Gareth Gates, who rose to fame on Pop Idol, turns 42 tomorrow, July 12.

angles.name: Pop Idol Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 42nd Birthday to Pop Idol star Gareth Gates tomorrow! What's your favourite of his early 00s hits?

angles.name: Tomorrow's Celebrations
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Gareth Gates turns 42 tomorrow. We're throwing it back to his Pop Idol days on Nation 00s.

moments.title: Liz Mitchell's Birthday
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of legendary disco group Boney M., turns 74 tomorrow, July 12.

angles.name: Disco Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the voice of Boney M., Liz Mitchell, tomorrow! Get ready to 'Rasputin' with us on Nation 70s.

angles.name: Euro-Disco Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 74th birthday of Liz Mitchell, the incredible lead singer of Boney M.! What's your favourite dancefloor classic?

moments.title: Deborah Cox's Birthday
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B superstar Deborah Cox, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, turns 52 on July 13.

angles.name: R&B Diva Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the phenomenal Deborah Cox on Monday! Get ready for some soulful R&B classics on Nation Love.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Deborah Cox, who turns 52 on Monday! Her voice is truly timeless.

moments.title: Roger McGuinn's Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds on Monday! A true pioneer of folk-rock.

angles.name: The Byrds Icon
angles.copy: On Monday, we celebrate Roger McGuinn's 84th birthday! His distinctive Rickenbacker sound shaped a generation.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland's Birthday
moments.blurb: Drummer and co-founder of The Police, Stewart Copeland, turns 74 on July 16.

angles.name: Police Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland on Thursday! The rhythm behind The Police's greatest hits.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating rock royalty on Thursday as Stewart Copeland turns 74! His unique drumming style is iconic.

moments.title: Luke Hemmings' Birthday
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 30 on July 16.

angles.name: 5SOS Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's very own Luke Hemmings on Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS track?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Star
angles.copy: Celebrating the big 3-0 for Luke Hemmings on Thursday! Send your birthday wishes to the 5SOS frontman.

moments.title: Geezer Butler's Birthday
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist Geezer Butler turns 77 on July 17.

angles.name: Metal Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler, the bassist and lyricist of Black Sabbath, on Friday! A true metal pioneer.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend
angles.copy: On Friday, we celebrate Geezer Butler's 77th birthday! His riffs and lyrics are foundational to heavy metal.

moments.title: Martha Reeves' Birthday
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, turns 85 on July 18.

angles.name: Motown Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves on Saturday! Get ready to 'Dancing in the Street' with us on Nation 60s.

angles.name: Soulful Icon
angles.copy: On Saturday, we celebrate the 85th birthday of Motown icon Martha Reeves! Her voice is pure soul.

moments.title: Brian May's Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist and rock icon Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Queen Guitarist Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May of Queen on Sunday! What's your favourite guitar solo from the maestro?

angles.name: Rock Royalty Celebration
angles.copy: On Sunday, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of rock god Brian May! His iconic sound changed music forever.

moments.title: Fred again.. Birthday
moments.blurb: British DJ and producer Fred again.., known for his innovative electronic music, turns 33 on July 19.

angles.name: Electronic Genius Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again.. on Sunday! Drop your favourite track by the electronic music maestro.

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Get into the weekend vibes and wish Fred again.. a Happy 33rd Birthday on Sunday! His music is the soundtrack to our nights out.

moments.title: Carlos Santana's Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock and Latin music, turns 79 on July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar playing is pure magic.

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: On Monday, we celebrate the 79th birthday of Carlos Santana! His fusion of rock and Latin rhythms is truly timeless.
